package.name: nav_algo_mppi_cuda
package.description:
CUDA kernels replacing the MPPI Optimizer hot loop on Jetson Orin. Targets: integrateStateVelocities, the 8 critics' trajectory-cost evaluation, and the softmax + weighted-average control update. Mathematical equivalence to nav_algo_core's xtensor/CPU path is preserved (reduction ordering may introduce ≤ 1e-5 absolute deltas on softmax outputs; the resulting cmd_vel matches CPU within 1e-3).
Build is gated on CUDA toolkit availability. Without nvcc, this package is silently skipped and nav_algo_mppi_ros1 stays on the nav_algo_core CPU path.
